title: Piero Cipollone: Sparking the transformation of finance - tokenisation and the role of central banks
body:
Keynote address by Mr Piero Cipollone, Member of the Executive Board of the European Central Bank, at the 24th Annual Symposium "Building the financial system of the 21st century: an agenda for Europe and the United States", hosted by the Harvard Law School and the Program on International Financial Systems, Washington DC, 15 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260416k.htm

title: Philip N Jefferson: Economic outlook and the labor market
body:
Speech by Mr Philip N Jefferson, Vice Chair of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, at the College of Business Administration, University of Detroit Mercy, Detroit, Michigan, 7 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260410f.htm

title: Michael S Barr: Rural communities - worth the investment
body:
Speech by Mr Michael S Barr, Member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, at "Strengthening America's economy through rural investment: a working forum", Washington DC, 14 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260416h.htm

title: Michael S Barr: Brief remarks on stablecoins
body:
Speech by Mr Michael S Barr, Member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, at "The GENIUS Act in practice: key questions for stablecoin regulation", The Federalist Society, Washington DC, 31 March 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260408b.htm
